user_feedback:
there should only be 6 levels, and it should be 20 notes, 30 notes, 40 notes, 50 notes, 60 notes, 70 notes. and the difficulty should be based of the speed of the notes and the amount of notes and the variety of notes

get rid fot eh tree and the progress bar thing as well, and show what level the player is in on the UI
analysis:
- Issue identified: The game needs to be restructured to have exactly 6 levels with specific note counts (20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70), difficulty based on speed/variety, tree visual removed, progress bar removed, and level number displayed
- Files affected: song_manager.js (note generation), ui.js (remove tree/progress bar, add level display), tree.js (disable rendering), note.js (support variable speed)
- Changes needed: 
  1. Modify generatePattern() to use fixed note counts per level (20-70)
  2. Increase note speed progressively per level
  3. Increase note variety (hold/swipe frequency) per level
  4. Remove tree rendering from tree.js
  5. Remove progress bar and tree height display from ui.js
  6. Add level number display to ui.js
  7. Update note speed to be variable based on level
